evals.prompt: Run /quick-fix fix the typo in the homepage hero section title
evals.expected_output: Creates Azure DevOps ticket, branches from develop, fixes the typo with tests, merges back to develop, updates .state.md
expectations: Creates an Azure DevOps work item (Task or Bug) for the fix
Creates a branch from develop with naming pattern fix/<ticket-id>-<description>
Reads .env.claude for Azure DevOps configuration, not .env
Implements the fix with at least one test
Runs the test suite before merging
Merges the fix branch back to develop
Commit message follows Conventional Commits format
Commit message does NOT include Co-Authored-By or AI attribution

evals.expected_output: Asks the user what needs to be fixed before proceeding
expectations: Does not create a ticket without a description
Asks the user to describe the issue
Does not branch or start implementing without user input
